channel.title: TripMarking
channel.description: Travel theft and scam prevention map for Korean travelers.

item.title: 트립마킹 심사 준비 노트
item.description: 트립마킹의 주제 집중도, 운영자 경험, 독자 가치, 안전 경계, 광고 분리 원칙을 정리한 공개 문서.

item.title: TripMarking Travel Safety Map
item.description: Mobile-first travel risk map with warning-marker identity, quick city search, one-tap nearby checks, compact spot summaries, and detailed response playbooks.

item.title: Travel Theft and Scam Prevention Guide
item.description: Practical checklist for stations, photo spots, cafes, night movement, and first response after a travel theft.

item.title: TripMarking Field Notes
item.description: How TripMarking interprets theft and scam risk through hands, attention, fatigue, approach proposals, and first-response routines.

item.title: City Risk Context
item.description: City-level travel safety context for Barcelona, Paris, Rome, London, Bangkok, Ho Chi Minh City, Tokyo, New York, Istanbul, and Amsterdam.

item.title: About TripMarking
item.description: TripMarking service purpose, editorial boundaries, and operating principles.
